testcase.name: SauceDemo — Full E2E Purchase Flow › Complete purchase flow: add to cart, remove item, checkout, confirm, logout
testcase.system-out:
[32m2026-07-21T20:12:55.569Z [STEP ] ▶ Logging in | {"username":"standard_user"}[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:57.431Z [INFO ] Login succeeded, proceeding to inventory page[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:57.456Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying inventory page loaded[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:57.580Z [INFO ] Inventory page loaded successfully[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:57.584Z [STEP ] ▶ Capturing full-page screenshot of products listing[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.036Z [INFO ] Screenshot captured[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:58.039Z [STEP ] ▶ Adding products to cart | {"products":["Sauce Labs Backpack","Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt","Sauce Labs Bike Light","Sauce Labs Onesie"]}[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:58.460Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying add-to-cart actions[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.516Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Backpack added to cart[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.574Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt added to cart[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.626Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Bike Light added to cart[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.682Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Onesie added to cart[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:58.730Z [INFO ] Cart badge shows 4[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:58.732Z [STEP ] ▶ Navigating to cart[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:58.940Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying cart contents (4 products)[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:59.009Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Backpack present in cart[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:59.009Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt present in cart[0m [INFO ] ✓ Backpack NOT present[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:59.367Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt still present[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:12:59.407Z [INFO ] ✓ Sauce Labs Bike Light still present[0m page loaded[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:12:59.817Z [STEP ] ▶ Filling checkout info | {"firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","zipCode":"12345"}[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.113Z [INFO ] Checkout info submitted[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:13:00.115Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying checkout overview[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.180Z [INFO ] Checkout overview page loaded[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:13:00.181Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying order line items[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.224Z [INFO ] ✓ Correct products listed[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.280Z [INFO ] ✓ Correct prices listed[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:13:00.281Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying order totals[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.341Z [INFO ] Order summary retrieved | {"itemTotal":"Item total: $33.97","tax":"Tax: $2.72","total":"Total: $36.69"}[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.399Z [INFO ] ✓ Item total correct[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.399Z [INFO ] ✓ Tax correct[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.399Z [INFO ] ✓ Grand total correct[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:13:00.558Z [STEP ] ▶ Clicking Finish button[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.672Z [INFO ] Order submitted[0m [32m2026-07-21T20:13:00.674Z [STEP ] ▶ Verifying confirmation page[0m [36m2026-07-21T20:13:00.824Z [INFO ] ✓ Order confirmed[0m
